guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor integration assessment is complete and has been cleared for fast-track approval. Your role is to provide procurement authorization for this integration. The vendor qualifies under the fast-track pathway (Class C, Tier 1, UNREGULATED data classification, no DPA required). Review the completed assessment and confirm procurement readiness. Your approval is a non-blocking item and is estimated to complete within 2-3 business days. Once you provide approval, the Business Owner approval will complete the pipeline.
next_steps: Review the fast-track approval assessment for the vendor integration
Confirm procurement authorization and compliance with vendor management policy
Submit approval within 2-3 business days to advance to Business Owner sign-off

guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor integration assessment is complete and approved for fast-track processing. Your role is to provide business authorization confirming operational readiness for this integration. The integration is classified as UNREGULATED with TIER_1 integration tier and EXPORT_ONLY type. No data protection agreements or additional security actions are required. Your approval is a non-blocking item and is estimated to complete within 3-5 business days. This is the final approval step in the pipeline.
next_steps: Review the completed vendor integration assessment
Confirm business operational readiness for the integration
Verify that all integration requirements align with business operations
Submit business authorization within 3-5 business days to close the approval pipeline
